summary: Iter 205: Validated the four feature deliverables — (1) one-click Implementation Pack orchestrator, (2) Notify Client attachment support, (3) Alpaca broker adapter wired (mock-mode without keys), (4) Resend infra in place but mocked. 8/8 backend pytest tests passed; frontend smoke confirmed the Implementation Pack button on /advice-document-builder triggers POST /api/implementation-pack/{client_id} (200) and renders the 4-step audit-trail card.
critical_code_review_comments: implementation_pack.py duplicates Resend send-logic that already exists in notify_client.py — consider extracting a helper to keep a single source of truth (DRY).
Notification doc inserted by implementation_pack.py uses mode='live'/'mocked'/'error' but never falls back to 'mocked' when mode=='live' yet to_email is missing — minor edge-case to harden later.

execution_rails.broker_adapter strips '.AX' suffix and substitutes 'SPY' if empty — flag this transparently in the stage detail so the adviser knows the Australian ticker was rewritten for paper trading.
implementation_pack.create_pack performs sequential awaits (pdf → notify → tickets → xmerge); for 5+ recommendations this could be parallelised with asyncio.gather to reduce p95 latency.
Pydantic Recommendation.ticket_type accepts any string — no enum validation; an unknown ticket_type silently creates a ticket that exec-rails dispatch will then 400 on.
test_credentials: localStorage wealth_command_compliance_v5='permanent', app_mode='adviser' (set via add_init_script before navigation)
seed_data_creation: Test client TEST_pack_<rand> used for impl-pack rows + several note_/tkt_/pack_ docs in MongoDB. All TEST-prefixed.
context_for_next_testing_agent: 8 pytest tests in /app/backend/tests/test_implementation_pack.py cover: POST /api/implementation-pack/{client_id} happy path (4 steps all ok), GET list, GET pdf/{pack_id} (+404), GET /api/exec-rails/adapters (Broker (Alpaca) live=false), POST /api/exec-rails/tickets/{id}/dispatch in mock mode, POST /api/notify/client with and without attachment_base64+attachment_name. Frontend Playwright confirmed builder-implementation-pack click → 200 with pack_id + 4 ticket_ids + steps[pdf_stored, notify_client, tickets_created, xmerge_push] all ok=true → audit-trail card visible with toast 'Implementation Pack pack_xxx created — 4 tickets · notify mocked · xmerge mock'. Earlier Xmerge/Execute Strategy/Notify-Client (iter 203/204) were skipped per instructions.
rca of the issue: N/A — no issues found in this iteration.
